blocks.text: We received an RFQ pack from Pemberton Engineering for a 3-year MRO supply framework. The documents are in the matter folder. Review them and give me your read — what needs pushback, what's standard, what's commercially material?
What's our exposure if their GTCs (Document 05) override the MSA on indemnities? Worst case, what are we signing up to?
Walk me through your top-3 redline targets and why each matters. Imagine I'm pitching this to the commercial sponsor in 5 minutes.
Anything to add given what they sent over after the first batch?
Mark up the Master Supply Agreement (02-master-supply-agreement.docx) with our redline based on your analysis. Save the output to the outputs/ subfolder of this matter.
